home.desc: A premium sanctuary of flavors, smoke, and spirits. Lose yourself in the moment.
home.p1_desc: Premium blends crafted for connoisseurs. Build your perfect aroma mix with our interactive composer.
home.p2_desc: Bold, vibrant dishes inspired by sun-drenched coasts and ancient spice routes. Every plate tells a story.
home.p3_desc: Craft mocktails, specialty teas, fresh juices and more — something refreshing for every mood.
home.p4_desc: Signature cocktails, fine spirits, wines and a curated selection of beers. Every sip is a deliberate pleasure.
home.amb_desc: From the first draw of hookah to the last sip of your cocktail — every detail is curated for those who appreciate the extraordinary.

hub.label: What We Offer
hub.title: THE MENU
hub.h_desc: Choose your model, compose your aroma blend, and step into a world of curated smoke and flavor. Our interactive builder lets you craft the experience before you arrive.
hub.f_desc: Bold, vibrant dishes that celebrate the richness of Mediterranean tradition — freshly crafted and beautifully presented for a night at the table.
hub.na_desc: Tea, coffee, fresh juice, smoothies and more — something for every taste.
hub.al_desc: Handcrafted cocktails, aperitifs, wines, whiskies and a curated selection of beers.

hookah.label: Hookah Menu
hookah.title: BUILD YOUR BLEND
hookah.desc: Select a tobacco brand, pick your aromas from any brand, and dial in the perfect percentages. Your blend, your night.
hookah.full: Blend full — remove to add more
hookah.empty: Select aromas to preview your blend
hookah.order: Call a waiter to place your order

food.label: Mediterranean Fusion
food.title: CUISINE
food.desc: Bold, vibrant dishes crafted with intention. Every plate is a story from the coast.
food.allergen: Please inform our staff of any dietary requirements or allergens. All prices are in Turkish Lira and include taxes.

about.label: Our Story
about.intro: CafeHookahPub was born from a simple belief — that a night out should be a full sensory experience, not just a transaction.
about.v_p1: We set out to build a space where the ancient art of hookah meets world-class cuisine and expertly crafted cocktails. A place that honors tradition while embracing the modern.
about.v_p2: Every element — from the curated aroma blends to the hand-picked spirits — is chosen with intention. You feel it the moment you walk through the door.
about.v_p3: This is a place for those who know that a great evening is never rushed, never ordinary, and always worth savoring.
about.craft_d: Every blend, every dish, every cocktail is made with care and precision. We refuse to settle for ordinary.
about.atm_d: The mood matters as much as the menu. We obsess over every detail — from lighting to the playlist.
about.con_d: Great experiences are shared. We create the space where conversations flow and memories are made.
